title: olearia × matthewsii
intro: Olearia × matthewsii, also known as the New Caledonian daisy, is a hybrid plant species native to New Caledonia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Olearia × matthewsii include its ability to accelerate wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Olearia × matthewsii are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
